About

Security-first AI engineering

I'm a Cybersecurity & AI/ML Engineering student with a dual focus on building intelligent systems and securing them. With hands-on experience in ethical hacking (CEH), threat modeling, and AI-powered security tools, I bring a rare combination of machine learning depth and security-first thinking. Based in Pune, Maharashtra — open to cybersecurity and AI/ML roles from 2026.
